### User Agreement (App)

Updated: January 7, 2026

Published: January 7, 2026

Effective: January 7, 2026

To help you understand the specific content of changes to this Agreement and to protect your personal rights and interests, we recommend that you carefully read the updated User Agreement, especially the provisions displayed in bold. If you have any objections or questions, you may contact us through the contact information published in this Agreement.

lynse (hereinafter referred to as "the Products") is an application software product owned and operated by **Shanghai Tianqi Lingguang Technology Co., Ltd.** (hereinafter referred to as "the Company"). This Agreement is a legally binding document entered into between the Company and registered users of the Products (hereinafter referred to as "Users" or "you").

This Agreement includes the body of this Agreement together with all policies, rules, statements, notices, and prompts that have been published or may be published in the future (hereinafter referred to as "Rules"). Once published, these Rules become an integral part of this Agreement and have the same legal effect as this Agreement.

Please read this Agreement carefully before registering as a user of the Products, especially the provisions concerning the limitation of the Company's liability or the restriction of your rights, and the provisions concerning dispute resolution and governing law. Provisions that require your special attention are marked in bold. If you do not agree with any provision of this Agreement, or if you cannot accurately understand the Company's interpretation of any provision, please do not proceed with any further operations. By registering as a user of the Products, you indicate that you have fully read, acknowledged, and agreed to comply with all contents of this Agreement. You also promise to comply with applicable U.S. federal and state laws, regulations, and other government normative documents. If you violate any such laws or regulations and cause any legal consequences, you shall bear all corresponding legal responsibilities independently in your own name.

**Our Services are not directed to minors, especially children under 14 years of age. If you are under 18 years of age, do not use the Services or provide us with any personal information.**

The Company reserves the right to formulate and modify this Agreement or various Rules from time to time as needed. The revised Agreement and Rules shall become effective automatically upon publication. They shall be legally binding on Users who register after the new Agreement or Rules take effect. For Users who registered before the effective date, if they continue to use the various services provided by the Products after the new Rules take effect, it shall be deemed that they have fully read, acknowledged, and agreed to comply with the new Agreement or Rules. If Users refuse to accept the new Agreement and Rules, they should immediately cease using the services provided by the Products; however, they shall bear any legal responsibilities arising from transactions already conducted on the Products and shall be governed by the Agreement or Rules that were in effect at the time of the transaction.

# I. Definitions and Interpretations

1. lynse application products and/or services (hereinafter referred to as "the Products" or "the Services"): includes the lynse mobile application (App) and other service forms officially provided by the Company.

2. User: "User" in this Agreement refers to any person who, after reading this Agreement, chooses to accept all terms of this Agreement. Users may register, log in, and use the services of the Products.

3. Affiliates: means any entity that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with the Company. "Control" and "controlled" refer to the power to direct the management policies of an entity through voting rights, contracts, or otherwise.

4. Account: refers to the user account you obtain after completing registration with authentic information. You are responsible for safeguarding your Account and shall bear legal responsibility for all activities conducted under your Account.

# II. Account Management

## 1. Account Registration

(1) You may apply for and register an account to use the Products. Your account is your registered mobile phone number. Registration and login are completed via the account + SMS verification code method. Your account serves as the credential for logging in and using the Products as a registered user.

(2) You understand and promise that the account you set must not violate any applicable laws, regulations, or the relevant Rules of the Products. Your account name, avatar, profile description, and other registration information and personal information must not contain illegal or harmful content. Without the permission of others, you must not open an account in the name of another person (including but not limited to impersonating another person's name, trade name, avatar, or other means that may cause confusion). You must not maliciously register accounts (including but not limited to frequently registering accounts or registering accounts in bulk). During account registration and use, you must comply with applicable laws and regulations and must not engage in any behavior that harms national interests, damages the lawful rights and interests of other citizens, or is detrimental to public morals. The Company reserves the right to review the registration information you submit.

(3) You must ensure that you provide a valid mobile phone number when registering/logging into your account and complete account registration using SMS verification. If the mobile phone number you provide is incomplete or inaccurate, you may not be able to use the Products or may be subject to restrictions during use.

(4) You must ensure the authenticity of the information you provide during registration. When registering and managing your account, please use authentic, accurate, lawful, and valid identity verification materials and necessary information. If the materials you submit or the information you provide are inaccurate, inauthentic, unlawful, or if the Company has reasonable grounds to suspect that the materials are erroneous, false, or unlawful, the Company reserves the right to refuse to provide you with relevant services, or you may not be able to use the Products or certain functions may be restricted.

## 2. Account Use

(1) The ownership and related rights of your registered account in the Products belong to the Company. After completing registration, you only have the right to use the account. You must use, operate, and manage your Products account correctly and appropriately. Your account is limited to your personal use only. Without the Company's written consent, it is prohibited to gift, lend, rent, transfer, sell, or otherwise permit others to use the account in any form. If the Company discovers or has reasonable grounds to believe that the account user is not you, the Company reserves the right to suspend or terminate services to the registered account without prior notice to you and to cancel the account without bearing legal liability to you.

(2) You are responsible for maintaining the security and confidentiality of your personal account and shall bear all legal responsibilities for activities conducted under your registered account, including but not limited to any data modifications, statements, and other operational actions you perform through the Products. You should attach great importance to account confidentiality and must not disclose your account to others under any circumstances. If you discover that someone is using your account without authorization or if any other security breach occurs, you should immediately notify the Company.

(3) If you lose your account, you may follow the Company's appeal procedures to promptly request account recovery. You understand and acknowledge that the Company's account recovery mechanism only requires verifying that the information provided on the appeal form is consistent with the system records. If the information you provide is inauthentic or incomplete, resulting in the inability to verify your identity or assess your needs, all losses caused by delayed processing shall be borne by you. You also understand that our response and the implementation of measures require a reasonable period. We are not responsible for any losses caused by reasons not attributable to our team.

(4) The Company specifically reminds you to properly safeguard your account. After use, you should log out securely. Losses caused by your failure to properly safeguard your account, including account theft, shall be your responsibility. If your account is used by a third party or any other problem occurs, you have an obligation to promptly notify the Company (including but not limited to providing your identity information and relevant identity materials, the relevant facts, and your demands).

(5) To protect your and the Company's interests, the Company reserves the right to review the relevant materials you submit (such as a photo of a natural person's government-issued ID, a copy of a business license, or a copy of an institution's legal person certificate) and to decide whether to approve your application. The Company may, at its discretion, require you to provide declarations/statements, service qualifications, service scope, and other materials. If you refuse to provide materials or the materials or information you submit are inauthentic, inaccurate, incomplete, or unlawful, you may not be able to use the Products or certain functions may be restricted. The Company's review does not constitute a guarantee of the authenticity, accuracy, or legality of the materials and information you submit. You shall bear independent responsibility for such materials and information.

(6) To better serve you, the Company reserves the right to classify and manage Users of the Products and to set corresponding permissions and provide corresponding services based on different levels.

## 3. Account Deletion

You have the right to delete your lynse account. You may delete your account in the manner described in this Agreement. After successfully verifying your identity and confirming that there are no pending matters, we will complete the deletion within 15 business days. For security purposes, we may require you to provide appropriate means to verify your identity and the legitimacy of your request. After successful deletion, we will delete or anonymize your personal information as soon as possible in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.

**App Account Deletion Process:** Open the App and navigate to ** Me -> Profile -> Delete Account** , then follow the instructions to complete account deletion.

# III. Installation, Uninstallation, and Updates

1. You must select the version of the Products that is compatible with your device. Under this Agreement, you are granted the following license:

(1) The Company grants you a personal, non-transferable, non-commercial, non-exclusive license to use the Products.

(2) All rights not expressly granted in this section or elsewhere in this Agreement are reserved by the Products. You must obtain separate written permission from the Products to exercise any such rights. The Products' failure to exercise any of the foregoing rights does not constitute a waiver of such rights.

2. Installation and Uninstallation

(1) You may download the Products directly from the Company's official website, authorized third-party websites, or platforms, or access and use the Products directly through the web. If you obtain the Products or an installation program with the same name as the Products from an unauthorized third-party website or platform, the Company cannot guarantee that the installation program you download will function properly and shall not be responsible for any losses caused thereby.

(2) We may have developed different versions for different terminal devices. You should select and download the appropriate version for installation based on your actual situation. After downloading the installation program, you need to install it correctly according to the steps prompted by the program.

(3) If you no longer need to use the Products or need to install a new version, you may uninstall it at your own discretion. If you are willing to help the Company improve its services, please let us know the reason for uninstallation.

3. To improve user experience and enhance service content, the Company will continuously strive to develop new services and provide you with updates to the Products from time to time (these updates may take the form of software replacement, modification, feature enhancement, version upgrades, etc.). When a new version of the Products is released, you will be reminded to download or update.

# IV. Service Content

1. You may use the Products through terminals such as computers and mobile phones in the form of web pages, client applications, etc., as specifically provided by the Company. The Company will continuously enrich the terminals and forms through which you can use the Products. When using the Products, you should select the version of the Products that matches your terminal and system; otherwise, you may not be able to use the Products normally.

2. Services Provided by the Products

(1) The Products currently support Mandarin Chinese and standard English speech content and make every effort to provide Users with various voice-to-text, transcription, and summarization functions;

(2) If the voice or original file content provided by a User is unlawful, contrary to public order and good morals, infringes upon the rights of others, or is otherwise deemed by the Company to be inappropriate for processing, the Company reserves the right to refuse the transcription, summarization, or sharing request without bearing any liability. The Company's refusal will be communicated to the User through in-app notifications, web pop-ups, or other reasonable means.

(3) To implement the intelligent transcription and summarization functions of voice content, the Products may use lawfully integrated or self-developed artificial intelligence models and algorithm services for processing. The Company will optimize, adjust, or replace the models and algorithms used from time to time based on business and technical development needs and will explain such changes to Users through appropriate means. For summary information about the models used by the Products, please refer to the [lynse Model Registration Information](model_instructions.html).

(4) After the service is completed, the Company is not obligated to save the relevant files you submitted. You should properly save them yourself. The Company does not provide recovery services and shall not be liable for any loss of voice or text caused by your personal reasons (including but not limited to accidental deletion, account issues, mobile phone system issues, viruses, and other factors).

(5) You should follow the principle of good faith when using the Products. If you have purchased unlimited-use credits, such credits are limited to your personal use only (except as otherwise provided by law).

3. Service Fees

(1) Certain services of the Products are provided on a paid basis. Due to the virtual product nature and characteristics of cloud services, the services you purchase are not subject to the seven-day no-reason return policy, unless otherwise provided by applicable law. Once you order a paid service using your personal account and password, it is deemed that you have personally ordered that paid service. You are obligated to pay the corresponding service fees on time in accordance with the applicable fee standards and payment methods. The Company will charge fees in accordance with the fee standards and payment methods for the relevant services. Specific service pricing is detailed on the relevant service pages within the Products. If you fail to pay the corresponding service fees on time, the Company has the right to automatically cancel your ordered paid service without further notice.

(2) The Company will confirm the corresponding fees for your request to use the service on the order-related page before you make payment. **After purchasing the Products' services, unless there are circumstances permitting cancellation or refund as stipulated in this Agreement or required by applicable law, cancellation or refund is not available.** The use of the Products is not subject to any form of bargaining. If you have questions about the fees for using the Products, you may consult customer service through the relevant page within the Products. Pricing information for using the Products is detailed in the pricing description within the Products.

(3) You agree: The Company has the right to adjust the fee standards for the Products' services based on factors such as market pricing and operating costs.

(4) You have the right to request an official invoice of equal value after completing payment. If you paid through the Apple App Store, please apply for an invoice directly from Apple Inc. If you paid through WeChat or Alipay, you may apply for an invoice on the WeChat/Alipay payment success page or in the bill details. Electronic invoices will be issued and sent to you by the payment platform.

** (5) If the credits you purchased have a specified validity period or usage period, you should use all credits within the validity period or usage period. After the expiration, you will not be able to continue using them, and the Company shall not be liable for this.**

** (6) After account deletion, unused credits in your account will no longer be usable, and the Company shall not be liable for this. Please proceed with caution. If you have any needs or questions, you may contact us through the contact information provided in this Agreement.**

# V. User Conduct Rules

1. The Company authorizes you to use the Products for non-commercial purposes. However, if you wish to use the Products commercially (including but not limited to: selling, copying, distributing, pre-installing, bundling, or using for other commercial activities), you must obtain prior written authorization and permission from the Company.

2. You may consult the Company regarding the downloading, installation, use, or uninstallation of the Products. The Company's obligation to answer questions should not exceed the Company's reasonable capacity. If you have any opinions about the Products or suggestions for improvement, please use the "Help and Support" function to express your opinions or suggestions.

3. Users fully understand and agree that any information uploaded, shared, or disseminated by Users of the Products does not represent the Company's views, and the Company shall not bear any responsibility for such content. At the same time, Users should independently judge the content provided by other Users of the Products and bear all risks arising from the use of such content, including risks arising from reliance on the accuracy, completeness, or legality of the content. The platform shall not bear any legal responsibility for such content.

4. You must not modify, copy, or distribute materials related to the Products. If you copy, modify, and distribute such materials and thereby cause harm to others or damage to the Company's image, you shall bear the corresponding legal responsibility. You must not delete, obscure, or alter the Company's copyright notices, trademarks, or other rights declarations.

5. The Products only provide Users with technical services such as transcription and summarization, as well as information network storage space services. All audio, video, and other content is uploaded by Users, and Users bear all legal responsibilities for all content uploaded to the Products. When uploading, publishing, or disseminating content on the Products, Users must ensure that the content does not violate applicable laws and regulations or their normative documents and does not infringe upon the lawful rights and interests of any third party. Otherwise, all adverse consequences shall be borne by the User personally. If the Company suffers losses as a result, the User shall also compensate the Company for such losses. For claims made by relevant rights holders against the Company due to the User's violation of this provision, the Company has the right to directly delete, take down, or block the disputed content without notifying the uploading User.

6. Users must ensure that they will not use the Products to infringe upon the lawful rights and interests of the Company or others. It is prohibited to disrupt the normal operation of the platform through network vulnerabilities, malicious software, or other illegal means. Otherwise, the Company has the right to freeze or ban the User and their account depending on the severity of the violation. If the violation constitutes a crime, the Company has the right to refer the matter to judicial authorities.

7. You acknowledge and agree that the Products provide AI-generated synthetic content services. We will, in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, add explicit and implicit labels (hereinafter referred to as "synthetic labels") to AI-generated synthetic content. Explicit labels will be added to the generated synthetic content or scene in a manner perceivable by Users. Implicit labels will be added to metadata and can be identified through technical means. You should fully understand and comply with the requirements of applicable laws and regulations regarding synthetic labels. Without permission, you must not delete, alter, or obscure synthetic labels, nor use the Products to generate or disseminate false information. The labeling method for AI-generated synthetic content in the Products is as follows:

(1) Text: A text prompt label will be added at an appropriate position at the end of the text, or a prominent prompt label will be added to the interactive scene interface or around the text, with content such as: "Content generated by AI, for reference only."

8. When you publish or use generated synthetic content, you should proactively apply explicit labels (including adding text, watermarks, etc.) to the synthetic content in accordance with the rules for labeling generated synthetic content. You must not maliciously delete, tamper with, forge, or conceal synthetic labels, provide tools or services for others to implement such malicious behavior, or harm the lawful rights and interests of others through improper labeling methods.

9. Users are prohibited from engaging in the following activities:

(1) Using any unauthorized or unpermitted plugins, add-ons, systems, or third-party tools to interfere with, disrupt, modify, or otherwise affect the normal operation of the Products.

(2) Engaging in or targeting any behavior that endangers computer network security against the Products, including but not limited to:

   1) Illegally intruding into others' networks, interfering with the normal functions of others' networks, stealing network data, or other activities that endanger network security;

   2) Providing programs or tools specifically designed for intruding into networks, interfering with normal network functions and protective measures, stealing network data, or other activities that endanger network security;

   3) Knowingly providing technical support, advertising promotion, payment settlement, or other assistance to others engaged in activities that endanger network security;

   4) Using unauthorized data or accessing unauthorized servers/accounts;

   5) Without permission, entering public computer networks or others' computer systems and deleting, modifying, or adding stored information;

   6) Without permission, attempting to probe, scan, test, or otherwise discover vulnerabilities in the Products' system or network or engaging in other behaviors that undermine network security;

   7) Attempting to interfere with or disrupt the normal operation of the Products' system or website, intentionally spreading malicious programs or viruses, and other behaviors that disrupt or interfere with normal network information services;

   8) Forging TCP/IP packet names or portions thereof.

(3) Reverse engineering, reverse assembling, reverse compiling, or otherwise attempting to discover the source code of the Products.

(4) Maliciously registering accounts for the Products, including but not limited to frequent or bulk account registration.

(5) You must not create, copy, upload, publish, or disseminate any of the following information content prohibited by applicable laws and regulations:

   1) Content that opposes the fundamental principles established by the constitution;

   2) Content that endangers national security or leaks state secrets;

   3) Content that incites the splitting of the country or undermines national unity;

   4) Content that damages national honor and interests;

   5) Content that promotes terrorism or extremism;

   6) Content that promotes ethnic hatred or ethnic discrimination, or undermines ethnic unity;

   7) Content that incites regional discrimination or regional hatred;

   8) Content that undermines national religious policies or promotes cults and superstitions;

   9) Content that fabricates or spreads rumors or false information, disrupting economic and social order and undermining social stability;

   10) Content that distributes or spreads violence, obscenity, pornography, gambling, murder, terror, or incites crime;

   11) Content that harms the lawful rights and interests of minors or damages the physical or mental health of minors;

   12) Content that involves unauthorized photographing or recording of others, infringing upon the lawful rights of others;

   13) Content that involves terror, violence, gore, high danger, or content that endangers the physical or mental health of performers or others;

   14) Content that endangers network security or uses the network to harm national security, honor, and interests;

   15) Content that insults or defames others, infringing upon the lawful rights and interests of others;

   16) Content that involves violent threats or intimidation against others, or the implementation of doxxing;

   17) Content that involves others' privacy, personal information, or data;

   18) Content that spreads foul language and damages public order and good morals;

   19) Content that infringes upon others' privacy rights, reputation rights, portrait rights, intellectual property rights, trade secrets, or other lawful rights and interests;

   20) Content that, without the Company's permission, uses the Products for self-promotion or third-party promotion, or publishes advertisements (including but not limited to inserting third-party links, advertisements, and other behaviors);

   21) Excessive marketing information, harassing and/or junk messages, vulgar information, or junk advertisements;

   22) Content produced, copied, uploaded, published, or disseminated in languages other than the commonly used language of the Products;

   23) Content, messages, or comments that are completely unrelated to the topic at hand;

   24) Published or disseminated content that is meaningless or deliberately uses character combinations to evade technical review;

   25) Other information that violates applicable laws, regulations, and policies of the relevant jurisdiction or public order and good morals, interferes with the normal operation of the Products' partner platforms, or infringes upon the lawful rights and interests of other Users or third parties.

# VI. Intellectual Property and Confidentiality

1. The Company owns the intellectual property and related rights of the Products, which are protected by international copyright conventions, U.S. copyright law, patent law, and other applicable intellectual property laws and regulations.

2. The Company grants you a revocable, limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable right to use the Products, limited to non-commercial use.

3. To the extent permitted by law, all rights to the text, audio, and other content you upload to the Products (Input Content) and the content you create using the Products (Output Content) belong solely to you or the original rights holders. The uploading, publishing, or other actions regarding Input Content shall not result in the transfer of intellectual property or other rights. You acknowledge and authorize that, to enhance your user experience with the Products, we may, after applying security encryption technology, de-identification, or anonymization processing, use the Input and corresponding Output Content collected by the Products for the optimization of the Products and Services under this Agreement. If you refuse to provide the foregoing authorization, you may provide feedback to us in accordance with the provisions of Section XIII of this Agreement. We will fully respect your opinions and take effective measures to protect your lawful rights and interests. Except as otherwise provided in this Agreement, without your permission, we will not disclose or disseminate your information, audio, or text manuscript content to third parties.

4. Confidentiality

(1) The Company will take special confidentiality measures and use advanced technology to securely process audio files. Through these strict measures, we strive to protect your information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. Maintaining the security and normal use of the Services is a shared responsibility of the Company and you. The Company will take appropriate security measures and technical means to maintain the Products.

(2) You understand and agree that if information disclosure occurs due to causes not attributable to the Company, such as natural disasters, theft, robbery, hacker attacks, etc., the Company shall not bear legal responsibility.

(3) The Company shall no longer bear confidentiality obligations under the following circumstances:

   1) Information, audio, or text manuscripts you provided have been made public for reasons not attributable to the Company;

   2) Disclosure is required by applicable laws and regulations, administrative or judicial authorities, or other authorized agencies;

   3) Prior authorization has been obtained from you;

   4) For the purpose of identifying, preventing, or addressing fraud, security, or technical issues;

   5) To enforce relevant service agreements or this Policy, or to protect the public interest;

   6) To protect the personal or property safety or other lawful rights and interests of our customers, the Company, our Affiliates, other Users, or employees, or for other reasonable and necessary purposes.

# VII. Advertising and Third-Party Information

1. The Products currently do not involve advertising or other promotional information. If the Company provides such services in the future, it will strictly comply with applicable laws and regulations and provide you with clear and convenient methods to opt out or unsubscribe.

2. The Products may contain content or links provided by third parties (including but not limited to third-party SDKs and links to external websites). The aforementioned content or information is independently provided by the relevant third parties. The Company makes no guarantees regarding the authenticity, legality, validity, or security of such content or information.

3. You should independently and carefully assess the authenticity and reliability of the aforementioned information. Except as expressly required by law, any transactions or behaviors you conduct based on such information, or any losses you suffer as a result, shall be borne by you personally, and the Company shall not bear any responsibility.

# VIII. Disclaimers

1. Although the Products (including their upgraded versions) have undergone detailed testing by the Company, the Company cannot guarantee full compatibility with all hardware, software, and systems. If incompatibility occurs, you may notify us of the situation to receive technical support. If the problem cannot be resolved, you may choose to stop using the Products, and the Company shall not bear any responsibility.

2. The Company makes no warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, regarding the following:

(1) That the relevant network services provided by the Products under this Agreement will meet your requirements;

(2) That the relevant services provided by the Products under this Agreement will not be affected by force majeure, computer viruses, hacker attacks, system instability, user location, user device shutdown, telecommunications provider issues, or any other external or human factors related to network, technology, or communication lines.

3. Third-Party Products and Services

(1) You acknowledge and agree that if you use products or services provided by third parties through links and tags in the Products, in addition to complying with this Agreement, you should also comply with the third party's user agreement. Disputes arising from your use of third-party products or services shall be resolved by you independently, and you shall bear the associated risks.

(2) Because when you use the Products or request the Products to provide specific services, the Products may invoke third-party systems or rely on third-party support for your use or access, the results of such use or access are provided by the third party (including but not limited to services provided by third parties through the Products' plugins). The Company does not guarantee the security, accuracy, effectiveness, or freedom from other uncertain risks of services and content provided through third parties. Any disputes and damages arising therefrom shall be borne by you personally.

(3) The relevant agreements or other documents displayed in various forms as described above are an integral part of this Agreement and have the same legal effect as this Agreement. You should comply with these requirements. If you fail to comply with these requirements, the third party or administrative/judicial authorities may initiate litigation, impose fines, or take other sanctions against you and may require the Company to provide assistance. You shall bear the legal responsibilities yourself.

THE PRODUCTS AND ALL RELATED SERVICES ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS. THE COMPANY MAKES NO WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

# IX. Privacy

Privacy-related provisions are governed by the [Privacy Policy](privacy-en.html).

# X. Children

**We do not direct our Services to minors. Please confirm that you are at least 18 years of age when using the Products. If you are under 18 years of age, do not register, log in, or use the Products, and do not provide us with any personal information.**

# XI. Breach and Enforcement

1. In response to your violation of this Agreement or other service terms, the Company has the right to independently determine and, as appropriate, take measures including issuing advance warnings, refusing publication, requiring rectification, immediately ceasing service provision, deleting content, suspending updates, restricting some or all account functions, and permanently closing accounts. The Company has the right to announce the results of enforcement actions and to decide at its discretion whether to restore service. Suspected violations of applicable laws or suspected illegal or criminal activities will have their relevant records preserved, and the Company will report to the relevant competent authorities and cooperate with their investigations.

2. If your violation of this Agreement or other service terms results in third-party complaints or litigation claims, you shall bear all legal responsibilities yourself. If your illegal or breach-of-contract behavior causes the Company or its Affiliates to compensate any third party or be subject to penalties, you shall also fully compensate the Company and its Affiliates for all losses suffered as a result.

3. The Company respects and protects the intellectual property, reputation rights, name rights, privacy rights, and other lawful rights and interests of legal entities and individuals. You guarantee that the text, audio, video, links, etc. uploaded when using the Products do not infringe upon any third party's intellectual property, reputation rights, name rights, privacy rights, or other rights and lawful interests. Otherwise, the Company has the right to remove the allegedly infringing content upon receiving notice from the rights holder or relevant parties. You shall bear all legal responsibilities for all claims made by third parties; if your infringing behavior causes losses to the Company or its Affiliates (including economic and reputational losses), you shall also fully compensate the Company and its Affiliates for all losses suffered.

# XII. Service Changes, Interruption, and Termination

1. You understand and agree that the Products and related services provided by the Company are provided on the basis of the current state of existing technology and conditions. The Company will make its best efforts to provide services to you and ensure service continuity and security. You understand that the Company cannot foresee or prevent all technical and other risks at all times, including but not limited to service interruptions, data loss, and other losses and risks that may be caused by force majeure, viruses, Trojans, hacker attacks, system instability, third-party service defects, and various other security issues.

2. You understand and agree that, for the needs of overall service operation, the Company has the right to modify, interrupt, suspend, or terminate the Products' services after giving notice, without being responsible or liable for any compensation to you.

3. The Company has the right to terminate this Agreement by providing you with advance notice through reasonable means. In such circumstances, if your account still has paid but uncompleted orders at the time of termination, the Company will provide appropriate compensation up to the actual amount paid for such order.

# XIII. Notices and Communications

1. If you have any opinions or suggestions while using the Products, you may submit them through the "Help and Support" function within the Products, and we will provide timely feedback. You should ensure that your contact information is accessible to receive calls or messages from us. We are not responsible for any losses caused by your failure to receive notifications.

2. If you have any questions or suggestions about this User Agreement while using the Products, please contact us through the following methods:

**Email:** contact@lynse.ai

**Address:** Room 1901, 19th Floor, Building A, No. 391 Guiping Road, Xuhui District, Shanghai, China 200233

3. To ensure that we can efficiently process your inquiry and provide timely feedback, you will need to provide proof of identity, valid contact information, a written request, and relevant evidence. We will process your request after verifying your identity. Under normal circumstances, we will respond within two business days.

# XIV. Miscellaneous

1. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of New York, without regard to its conflict of law principles. Any disputes arising from or relating to this Agreement shall first be resolved through good-faith negotiation between the parties. If the dispute cannot be resolved through negotiation, either party may submit the dispute to binding arbitration administered by the American Arbitration Association (AAA) in New York, New York, in accordance with its then-current rules. The arbitration shall be conducted in English. Judgment upon the award rendered by the arbitrator(s) may be entered in any court of competent jurisdiction.

2. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties regarding the subject matter hereof. All rights not expressly granted in this Agreement are reserved by the Company. You must obtain separate written permission from the Company to exercise any such rights. The Company's failure to exercise any of the foregoing rights does not constitute a waiver of such rights.

3. If any provision of this Agreement is held to be wholly or partially invalid or unenforceable for any reason, the remaining provisions of this Agreement shall remain valid and binding.

4. The Products are intended for use worldwide. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the Products complies with all applicable local, state, national, and international laws and regulations.
